blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 482 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
